creator: lippemail@gmail.com
text:
beech@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [UPDATE] sysutils/htop

Hi all,

Here i has the same problem, see:

cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I.  -DSYSCONFDIR=\"/usr/local/etc\"   -pedantic 
-Wall -std=c
99 -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -std=c99 -MT Process.o -MD -MP -MF 
.deps/Proc
ess.Tpo -c -o Process.o Process.c
Process.c: In function 'Process_getAffinity':
Process.c:200: warning: implicit declaration of function 
'sched_getaffinity'
Process.c:200: error: 'cpu_set_t' undeclared (first use in this function)
Process.c:200: error: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
Process.c:200: error: for each function it appears in.)
Process.c:200: error: expected expression before ')' token
Process.c: In function 'Process_setAffinity':
Process.c:205: warning: implicit declaration of function 
'sched_setaffinity'
Process.c:205: error: 'cpu_set_t' undeclared (first use in this function)
Process.c:205: error: expected expression before ')' token
*** Error code 1

[uname -a]
FreeBSD shire.freebsd.org 7.0-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-PRERELEASE #0: Thu 
Jan 10 01:55:37 BRST 2008     
lippe@shire.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Thanks! :)
